testcase.name: putcontactLogv4

failure.message: expected [{"Check":{"Success":true,"Data":{"FileName":"C:\\Users\\tr15523\\Documents\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\APCHE0000.TXT"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Sent To AP updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"LocationId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"CustomerId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"ActionCode is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"FirstContactDateTime is required","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Check":{"Success":true,"Data":{"FileName":"C:\\Users\\tr15523\\Documents\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\APCHE0000.TXT"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Sent To AP updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"LocationId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"CustomerId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"ActionCode is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"FirstContactDateTime is required","Level":3}]}}] at com.NexustAPIAutomation.java.CommonMethods.putMethod(CommonMethods.java:786) at Private.contactLogController.putcontactLogv4(contactLogController.java:54) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) ... Removed 33 stack frames
